userProfile.title: UserProfile
userProfile.description: User profile with personal particulars, basic emergency health information, and custom emergency SMS alert texts.

name.description: Human legible name of the user.

phone.description: The registered primary emergency mobile contact number.

medicalConditions.description: Active or relevant health history items to be displayed to EMT responders.

emergencyNotes.description: Special medical instructions or situational context.

triggerMessage.description: Standard prefilled distress message to be sent to emergency contacts during SOS event.

emergencyContact.title: EmergencyContact
emergencyContact.description: Trusted individual selected to serve as immediate emergency responders.

alertHistory.title: AlertHistory
alertHistory.description: Historically tracked alert logs triggered during active SOS occurrences.

chatMessage.title: ChatMessage
chatMessage.description: AI-powered conversation history thread to manage context.

evidenceVaultItem.title: EvidenceVaultItem
evidenceVaultItem.description: Uploaded or recorded audio, image, and note evidence securely stored.

users/{userId}.description: Top-level collection for storing user profile and safety triggers.

users/{userId}/contacts/{contactId}.description: Sub-collection mapped for managing designated emergency contacts.

users/{userId}/history/{alertId}.description: Sub-collection preserving the historic log of triggered alarms, incidents, and recordings.

users/{userId}/chat/{messageId}.description: Sub-collection logging conversational safety aid details securely.

users/{userId}/checkins/{checkinId}.description: Sub-collection managing active and historical journey security timers.

users/{userId}/evidence/{evidenceId}.description: Sub-collection securing uploaded safety files, voice recordings, and notes.
